ORDER - PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FRED RICHARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING & ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD HOW THE DECLARATORY RELIEF WOULD IMPACT DEFENDANT, AND THAT DEFENDANT HAS AN INTEREST IN THE DOCUMENTS PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO CANCEL. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHAT DEFENDANT WOULD BE ENJOINED FROM. NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CIVIL CONSPIRACY MAY BE PLED WITHOUT COURT ORDER CC SECTION 1714.10. FRAUD MUST BE PLED WITH PARTICULARITY. PLAINTIFF MUST DEMONSTRATE ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT THAT HIS CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT TIME-BARRED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT FRED RICHARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Raymond Burke, Esq. 931-4207 for pltf & opposing party (gave notice at 4:30pm; not arguing/requesting additional time to file amended complaint); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling & adopted as follows: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD HOW THE DECLARATORY RELIEF WOULD IMPACT DEFENDANT, AND THAT DEFENDANT HAS AN INTEREST IN THE DOCUMENTS PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO CANCEL. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHAT DEFENDANT WOULD BE ENJOINED FROM. NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CIVIL CONSPIRACY MAY BE PLED WITHOUT COURT ORDER CC SECTION 1714.10. FRAUD MUST BE PLED WITH PARTICULARITY. PLAINTIFF MUST DEMONSTRATE ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT THAT HIS CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT TIME-BARRED. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
